root.name: Add new bullet point to slide 5
root.description: Evaluates whether a new bullet point 'Published findings in 1898' was correctly added at the end of slide 5's bullet list.

children.name: Bullet point text correctness
children.description: Checks if the new bullet point text exactly matches 'Published findings in 1898'.

children.name: Bullet point position correctness
children.description: Checks if the new bullet point was added at the end of the existing bullet list on slide 5.

children.name: No extraneous changes
children.description: Checks that no unrelated content, slides, animations, or transitions were added, removed, or modified other than the specified bullet point addition.

metadata.task: In slide 5, add a new bullet point at the end which says: 'Published findings in 1898'
